seo.title: PrimaSTEM for Schools — Screen-Free Coding and Math Robot
seo.description: Programmable wooden robot for classroom use. Two curriculum levels (4–7 logic, 7–10 math). Lesson plans included. Volume pricing on request.

hero.title: Coding and mathematics, ages 4–10. One device.
hero.subtitle: No screen, no apps. Works with maps from any robot you already have.

sections.body:
They place command tokens on the board — that's their program, visible in full. Press "Start." The robot executes. Wrong result? Find the error, swap a token, run again.

Sequences, functions, loops, debugging. No screen. Hands only.

A toy that teaches. A tool that's fun to play with.

**Ages 4–7: Logic.** Logical steps, 90° turns. Forward, backward, left, right, function, repeat. Planning, sequences, debugging, counting.

PrimaSTEM adapts to the methods of any other educational robot. Step size can be anything — for example 10, 12, 15 or 20 cm. Works with any grid map you already have.

**Ages 7–10: Mathematics.** Precise distances in mm and any angle in degrees: 1°–360°. Arithmetic: +, −, ×, ÷, √, ^. Negative numbers. Progressions.

Insert a marker — the robot draws polygons, stars, spirals, fractals on paper or a whiteboard.

These are not illustrations. Children programmed these.

Forward 50, Right 144, Repeat 5 = a star. Mathematics you can see.
Objectives, materials, step-by-step instructions, printables. Open and teach. Full documentation at docs.primastem.com — 10 languages.

**Open platform.** Every token is a standard NFC tag. Create your own numbers, loops or arithmetic operations through a free phone app.

**Sound maps.** Place NFC tags on the playing field — the robot plays audio when it drives over them.

**Voice feedback.** The board speaks each token aloud as it's placed in 17 languages: English, Français, Русский, Українська, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Português (Brasil), Nederlands, Norsk, Polski, Svenska, Türkçe, Dansk, Català, 日本語, עברית. Helps children who can't read yet and children with visual impairments.

**Braille version** in pilot testing. Accessible for children with visual and attention impairments.

cta.title: Request a quote
cta.subtitle: Complete kit: robot, control board, tokens, activity guide on the documentation site. Rental available. Also available through distributors.
